title: Spicy Thai Chicken Noodles
description: Pillowy noodles tossed in a fiery sauce made with fermented fish paste, lemongrass, and molasses, served with crispy fried shallots
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside
In a blender or food processor, combine fermented fish paste, lemongrass, molasses, Thai red curry paste, fish sauce, sambal oelek, and lime juice. Blend until smooth
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add the chicken breast and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet
Add the sliced shallots to the skillet and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes
Add the blended sauce to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until slightly thickened
Add the cooked noodles, chicken, and crispy shallots to the skillet. Toss everything together until the noodles are well coated in the sauce
Season with soy sauce and fish sauce to taste
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with fresh cilantro
